meta.title: Pemphani kuti mupange pulogiramu ya umo mungapharazgira

hero.title: Pemphani kuti mupange pulogiramu ya umo mungapharazgira
hero.lead: IATF yikupenjerezga ma projekiti agho ghakovwira ŵanthu kuŵa na vinthu ivyo ŵakukhumbikwira nadi.
support: Kuti mupulikiske makora suzgo ili, mukwenera kumanya uyo wakukhwaskika na suzgo ilo, kweniso chifukwa icho suzgo ili liliri lakuzirwa.

intro: Nthowa zose zikulongosoreka mu ndondomeko yimoza.

items.label: Webusayiti
items.body: Gwiliskirani nchito fomu iyo yili pasi apa kuti mulembe ivyo mukukhumba.

items.label: E-mail
items.body: Tumizani pempho linu ku: {{contact.requestsEmail}}Para ŵapolisi ŵafika pa malo agha na kuŵawona, ŵakuŵaphalira kuti ŵafumemo mu malo agha.

items.label: Kupambana Maghanoghano
items.body: Yambani pa malo agha usange nchakusuzga yayi, ndipo pemphani kuti mulutenge pa malo gheneagho.

guidance.title: Pambere mundatumizge pempho
paragraphs: IATF imagwira ntchito pagulu. Zopempha zingapangike mwachidule ndi kusindikizidwa ngati mbiri ya zopempha pagulu mu bungwe laIATF GitHub, pa webusayiti iyi, kapena zonse ziwiri.

Lekani kulemba maadiresi gha ŵanthu, manambara gha foni, madokotala, panji vinthu vinyake vyakukhwaskana na awo ŵakugwiliskira ntchito vinthu ivi, pekha usange ntchakukhumbikwa nadi ndipo mukuzomerezga kuti IATF yiweleremo.
IATF yikuwuskamo vinthu vyambura kukhumbikwa vyakukhwaskana na munthu pambere yindaphalire ŵanthu ivyo vyalembeka.

review.title: Kuwona ivyo tikulindizga
paragraphs: Para munthu wapempha wovwiri, chikung'anamura kuti wapokelerenge wovwiri wake yayi.
IATF yikuwona usange ntchito iyi njakwenelera, kweniso usange njakovwira.
Vinthu vinyake ivyo tikulomba tingavizomera yayi, tingaviwezga, panji kusintha dankha pambere tindavizomerezge.

fields.name: wakupempha
fields.label: Zina linu panji la gulu linu
fields.helper: Kasi ni njani uyo wakucita pempho ili?

fields.name: Umo Mungapharazgira
fields.label: Umo mungaŵapokelera
fields.helper: Adiresi ya e-mail panji zina la pa Discord kuti timanye vinandi.

fields.name: suzgo
fields.label: Kasi ni suzgo wuli ilo mukukhumba kumazga?
fields.helper: Longosorani suzgo ili mu mazgu ghapusu.

fields.name: extraContext
fields.label: Nkhani Zinyake
fields.helper: Pelekani vinthu vinyake ivyo vingamovwirani kuti mupulikiske ivyo mukukhumba: chifukwa icho mukukhumbira, viyelezgero, mazgu ghakulongosora nkhani yinyake, panji ivyo mungayowoya pa nkhani ya nyengo iyo mukukhumba kuzakachitira.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Kasi mukujipulika makora para mukufumiska vinthu mu mawoko gha ŵanthu wose?
fields.helper: Vinthu ivyo vyazomerezgeka ni ivyo vikulembeka na IATF.

items: malo osungiramo mabuku mu gulu la IATF GitHub
layisensi ya copyleft ya code na project materials
Kulembetsa m'kaundula pa malo a IATF

header.title: Kuyowoya mwakudumura na kupempha munthu kuti watovwire nkhwakukwana.

paragraphs: Usange muli na suzgo la umo mungapharazgira ndipo mukughanaghana kuti lingazgoka pulogiramu ya ŵanthu wose, mungatiphalira.
